output_aliases.scores_mode_a_heatmap_full: Scores (Mode A Heatmap Matrix, All Samples)
output_aliases.sbs_mode_profile_factors_full_a: SBS Mode Profile Factors (A Mode Full)
output_aliases.sbs_mode_profile_axes_full_a: SBS Mode Profile Axes (A Mode Full)
output_aliases.sbs_mode_a_sample_axis_full: SBS Mode A Sample Axis (All Samples)

passforward.description: Expose selected PARAFAC outputs as routed downstream inputs when enabled.

short_description: PARAFAC decomposition with missing-data, profile constraints, sweep, calibration, and CV support.
long_description: Fits a CP/PARAFAC model to multiway data, supports NaN-aware fitting, optional reference/initial/fixed profiles, optional sweep across component counts, and calibration of mode-A scores against Y.

layout.name: n_components
layout.label: Number of Factors
layout.tooltip: Number of factors to extract from the data tensor.

layout.name: init_method
layout.label: Initialization
layout.tooltip: Method for initializing factor matrices. 'SVD' uses singular value decomposition, 'Random' uses random values, and 'Custom' allows user-provided initial factors.

layout.name: max_iter
layout.label: Maximum Iterations
layout.tooltip: Maximum number of iterations for the fitting algorithm.

layout.name: random_multi_start
layout.label: Random Multi-Start
layout.tooltip: When enabled, run multiple random initializations and keep the best fit.

layout.name: random_multi_start_runs
layout.label: Random Multi-Start Runs
layout.tooltip: Number of random starts when multi-start is enabled. Minimum is 1.

layout.name: tol
layout.label: Tolerance
layout.tooltip: Convergence tolerance for the fitting algorithm.

layout.name: random_state
layout.label: Random Seed
layout.tooltip: Optional integer seed. Leave blank for different random results on each run.

layout.name: missing_constrained_solver
layout.label: Missing+Constraint Solver
layout.tooltip: Used only when both missing values and TensorLy constraints are active.

layout.name: orient_mostly_negative_pairs
layout.label: Orient Mostly-Negative Mode Pairs
layout.tooltip: If enabled, components are sign-oriented by flipping pairs of mostly-negative mode vectors before score extraction. This improves interpretability without changing the fitted tensor.

layout.name: sweep_mode
layout.label: Sweep Factors
layout.tooltip: When enabled, multiple models are fitted while sweeping factor numbers and evaluated instead of a single user-specified count. Useful for generating scree plots.

layout.name: validation_processing
layout.label: Validation Processing
layout.tooltip: Batch: adds all validation/test samples at once. Sample by Sample: fits one model per validation/test sample.

layout.name: mode_centering
layout.label: Mode Centering
layout.tooltip: Enable centering for selected modes. One checkbox per mode.

layout.name: mode_normalization
layout.label: Mode Normalization
layout.tooltip: Enable normalization for selected modes. One checkbox per mode.

layout.name: constraint_non_negative
layout.label: Non-negative
layout.tooltip: Forces selected mode factors to be non-negative (no values below zero).

layout.name: constraint_normalize
layout.label: Normalize
layout.tooltip: Normalizes selected mode factors during updates to reduce scale ambiguity across modes.

layout.name: constraint_unimodality
layout.label: Unimodality
layout.tooltip: Enforces single-peak (single-hump) profiles for selected modes.

layout.name: constraint_monotonicity
layout.label: Monotonicity
layout.tooltip: Enforces monotonic profiles (increasing or decreasing) for selected modes.

layout.name: constraint_smoothness
layout.label: Smoothness
layout.tooltip: Penalizes rapid point-to-point changes to produce smoother selected mode profiles.

layout.name: constraint_smoothness_strength
layout.label: Smoothness Strength
layout.tooltip: Optional per-mode smoothness weight. Leave entries empty to use default 1.0 for enabled modes.

layout.name: constraint_simplex
layout.label: Simplex
layout.tooltip: Constrains selected mode factors to the simplex (non-negative with fixed sum, e.g., compositional profiles).

layout.name: constraint_simplex_strength
layout.label: Simplex Strength
layout.tooltip: Optional per-mode simplex target. Leave entries empty to use default 1.0 for enabled modes.

layout.name: constraint_l1_reg
layout.label: L1 Regularization
layout.tooltip: Applies L1 penalty (sum of absolute values), promoting element-wise sparsity and exact zeros.

layout.name: constraint_l1_reg_strength
layout.label: L1 Regularization Strength
layout.tooltip: Optional per-mode L1 weight. Leave entries empty to use default 1.0 for enabled modes.

layout.name: constraint_l2_reg
layout.label: L2 Regularization
layout.tooltip: Applies L2 penalty on the norm (not squared), shrinking whole vectors/groups by magnitude.

layout.name: constraint_l2_reg_strength
layout.label: L2 Regularization Strength
layout.tooltip: Optional per-mode L2 weight. Leave entries empty to use default 1.0 for enabled modes.

layout.name: constraint_l2_square_reg
layout.label: L2 Squared Regularization
layout.tooltip: Applies squared L2 penalty (ridge/Tikhonov), giving smooth shrinkage that usually does not create exact zeros.

layout.name: constraint_l2_square_reg_strength
layout.label: L2 Squared Regularization Strength
layout.tooltip: Optional per-mode squared-L2 (ridge) weight. Leave entries empty to use default 1.0 for enabled modes.

layout.name: constraint_normalized_sparsity
layout.label: Normalized Sparsity
layout.tooltip: Encourages sparsity with scale normalization, making sparsity pressure less dependent on raw magnitude.

layout.name: constraint_normalized_sparsity_strength
layout.label: Normalized Sparsity Strength
layout.tooltip: Optional per-mode normalized-sparsity level. Leave entries empty to use default 1.0 for enabled modes.

layout.name: constraint_soft_sparsity
layout.label: Soft Sparsity
layout.tooltip: Applies a soft sparsity penalty that shrinks many entries toward zero without hard thresholding.

layout.name: constraint_soft_sparsity_strength
layout.label: Soft Sparsity Strength
layout.tooltip: Optional per-mode soft-sparsity weight. Leave entries empty to use default 1.0 for enabled modes.

layout.name: constraint_hard_sparsity
layout.label: Hard Sparsity
layout.tooltip: Applies hard sparsity by keeping only the strongest entries and setting the rest to zero.

layout.name: constraint_hard_sparsity_strength
layout.label: Hard Sparsity Strength
layout.tooltip: Optional per-mode hard-sparsity level (kept entries). Leave entries empty to use default 1 for enabled modes.

layout.name: unconstrained_sparsity
layout.label: Sparsity
layout.tooltip: Unconstrained PARAFAC only. Global model-level option (not per-mode). Ignored when any mode constraints are enabled.

layout.name: unconstrained_linesearch
layout.label: Linesearch
layout.tooltip: Unconstrained PARAFAC only. Global model-level option (not per-mode). Ignored when any mode constraints are enabled.

layout.name: unconstrained_orthogonalise
layout.label: Orthogonalise
layout.tooltip: Unconstrained PARAFAC only. Global model-level option (not per-mode). Ignored when any mode constraints are enabled.

layout.name: profile_paths
layout.label: Profile Files
layout.tooltip: List of profile files (one per data mode, based on Data Order).

layout.name: profile_usage
layout.label: Profile Usage
layout.tooltip: Usage mode per profile input: none, reference, initial, or fixed.

layout.name: component_y_mapping
layout.label: Component to Y Mapping
layout.tooltip: One entry per component: Y column index (1-based). Empty entry excludes that component. If all are empty, all valid component-to-Y combinations are evaluated automatically.

layout.name: class_data_cal
layout.label: Calibration Class Data
layout.tooltip: Routed from validation_data_main output for class coloring on score plots

layout.name: class_data_val
layout.label: Validation Class Data
layout.tooltip: Routed from validation_data_main output for class coloring on score plots

layout.name: smp_cal
layout.label: Calibration Sample Labels
layout.tooltip: Routed from load_data or validation_data_main output for tooltip display on score plots

layout.name: smp_val
layout.label: Validation Sample Labels
layout.tooltip: Routed from validation_data_main output for tooltip display on validation score plots

sections.short_description: Ellipsoidal joint confidence region (EJCR) for OLS slope and intercept of calibration predictions. The ideal point (slope=1, intercept=0) inside the ellipse indicates unbiased calibration.
Ellipsoidal joint confidence region (EJCR) for OLS slope and intercept of validation predictions. The ideal point (slope=1, intercept=0) inside the ellipse indicates unbiased prediction.
EJCR for the calibration OLS fit of the PARAFAC model built for each validation sample. Navigate by pairing and by validation sample (model index).

config.title: Validation EJCR (Aggregated Over All Val Samples)

sections.short_description: EJCR for the validation OLS fit, computed by aggregating all validation samples across SBS models. The ideal point (slope=1, intercept=0) inside the ellipse indicates unbiased prediction.
